query:
-- หาสัญญาที่ contracts.bad_debt_amount > 0 แต่ payment_transactions ทุก row มี raw_json.bad_debt_amount = 0
-- นี่คือสาเหตุที่ debtDb.ts ไม่เห็น bad_debt rows
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.external_id) as contract_count,
  SUM(c.bad_debt_amount) as total_missing_bad_debt
FROM contracts c
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM payment_transactions pt
    WHERE pt.contract_external_id = c.external_id
      AND pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
-- หาสัญญาที่ contracts.bad_debt_amount > 0 แต่ payment_transactions ทุก row มี raw_json.bad_debt_amount = 0
-- นี่คือสาเหตุที่ debtDb.ts ไม่เห็น bad_debt rows
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.external_id) as contract_count,
  SUM(c.bad_debt_amount) as total_missing_bad_debt
FROM contracts c
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM payment_transactions pt
    WHERE pt.contract_external_id = c.external_id
      AND pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0
  );
